MineralSite.name: NI 43-101 Technical Report (PFS) for the Sonora Lithium Project in North America, Mexico dated 2016.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report (PFS) for the Sonora Lithium Project in North America, Mexico dated 2016.pdf
document.description: This document is a technical report summarizing the pre-feasibility study (PFS) for the Sonora Lithium Project in Mexico, including project scope, geological settings, mineral resource estimates, and economic analysis.
